column1: # Live run on Groq. Median questions_asked target: ≤ 7 (plan §Phase 2 ship gate).
#   2026-05-02 commit 2415b0b: routed Phase 3/4/5 to Groq; first live run hit median=9.
#                              Diagnosed root cause: ingestAnswer wrote to
#                              re-emitted the same gaps every turn until MAX_INTAKE_STEPS hit.
#   2026-05-02 fix(intake):    ingestAnswer now promotes answers into intakeSpec / stanceBecauseClauses
#                              method-based fallback. nextStep merges the in-progress slices into
#                              the freshly-hydrated spec via effectiveSpecFor() before scoring.
#                              Median moved from 9 → 7. Range now 2–9 across the 9 fixtures
# Cost remains ~$0.00 across the 9 fixtures (Groq pricing on the small models used here).
